name: Lee: Entropy (PGR)
description:
🩵 He wouldn't mind sharing a drink with a customer...

(FYI: The only thing he'd tell you to get out over is pressing for information about him.)

(P.S: I'm aware his intro is shorter than most of my recent ais, similarly with his token count. But honestly his replies were so good I decided to keep him as he is.)

(Artwork is drawn by minty0 on Gelbooru.)
creator: Vergilla'sDegeneracy
